hero.badge: CRM built for real sales teams
hero.title: Never lose a lead or miss a follow-up again
hero.subtitle: LeadForge gives your sales team a focused, fast CRM to capture leads, move deals, and close more revenue — without the complexity of enterprise tools.
hero.noCard: No credit card required. 14-day free trial.

trust.title: Built for operational sales
trust.subtitle: A focused workspace for pipeline discipline, quoting, and team accountability.

bullets.pipeline: Pipeline governance with stage hygiene and deal health signals
bullets.followup: Tasks, activities, sequences, and a sales inbox for real touchpoints
bullets.team: Roles, reporting, and dashboards managers can actually use

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: For small teams getting serious about pipeline.

growth.name: Growth
growth.description: For teams that need scale without enterprise bloat.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For larger SMB revenue teams and tighter governance.

pipeline.title: Pipeline you can govern
pipeline.body: Stage definitions, exit criteria, stale-deal signals, and manager-ready views help your team run a disciplined forecast — not just move cards on a board.

automation.title: Automation that supports reps
automation.body: Sequences, lightweight workflow rules, and routing hooks are designed to reduce manual follow-up without turning your CRM into a scripting playground.

integrations.title: Connect your revenue stack
integrations.body: LeadForge is structured for email, calendar, billing, and webhook integrations so you can meet customers where they work — with clear connection states in one directory.

features.title: Everything your team needs to close more deals
features.subtitle: A complete sales workspace — from first lead to signed quote.

pipeline.title: Visual Pipeline Management
pipeline.description: Drag deals across stages, spot bottlenecks instantly, and keep your whole team aligned on what to close next.

leads.title: Smart Lead Capture
leads.description: Capture, score, and qualify leads from any source. Convert the best ones to contacts and opportunities in one click.

followup.title: Follow-up You Won't Forget
followup.description: Tasks, reminders, and activity tracking make sure no deal goes cold. Get alerts when deals need attention.

quotes.title: Professional Quotes
quotes.description: Create, send, and track quotes with line items, taxes, and PDF export. Link them directly to opportunities.

forecast.title: Forecast & Reports
forecast.description: Real-time pipeline value, win rate, and monthly forecast. Know exactly where your revenue is coming from.

ai.title: AI Sales Assistant
ai.description: Get AI-powered summaries, next step suggestions, and follow-up drafts — right where you're working.

pricing.title: Simple, predictable pricing
pricing.subtitle: No per-seat surprises. Pick the plan that fits your team.

trial.a: Yes. Every plan starts with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.

cancel.a: Absolutely. Cancel anytime from your billing settings. No lock-in.

upgrade.q: Can I upgrade or downgrade later?
upgrade.a: Yes. You can change your plan at any time and we'll prorate the difference.

data.q: What happens to my data if I cancel?
data.a: Your data is yours. You can export everything before cancelling.

founderLed.title: Founder-led Sales
founderLed.description: You're the sales team. LeadForge keeps you focused on the right leads without getting lost in spreadsheets.

salesTeam.title: Small Sales Teams
salesTeam.description: Give your reps a shared workspace with clear ownership, pipeline visibility, and no duplicated effort.

agencies.title: Agencies & Consultancies
agencies.description: Manage your new business pipeline alongside your client work. Quote fast, close faster.

demo.title: See LeadForge in action
demo.subtitle: Book a 20-minute demo and we'll show you how LeadForge can fit your team's workflow.

form.success: Thanks! We'll be in touch within 1 business day.

footer.tagline: The focused CRM for growing sales teams — pipeline, follow-up, and quotes in one place.

cta.title: Ready to close more deals?
cta.subtitle: Give your team one workspace for pipeline control, follow-up discipline, and quoting.
